description: Sector overlay for exploration, mineral titles, mining leases, support services, environmental/social controls, local content, and mining operations documentation in Ghana.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only sector overlay controls for Mining. Intended to be used with ghana_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Minerals Commission Acts and Regulations portal

rules.title: Mineral title, licence, lease, or permit evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for prospecting licence, reconnaissance licence, mining lease, quarry licence, small-scale mining licence, or Minerals Commission title evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Mining operating plan, support-service, or technical compliance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for mine operating plan, support services permit, technical report, health and safety, or mine manager evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Environmental, compensation, resettlement, or community evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for environmental management, compensation, resettlement, reclamation, community engagement, or water/body protection evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Worker, contractor, community, or vendor data-protection controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for personal-data handling, privacy, consent, worker records, vendor records, or data security evidence.
